narrative:
Congress Township has 2,146 registered voters, with 46.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.7 percentage points.
